application.notes: YouTube video link required (max 6 minutes): ballet and contemporary class material (centre work; no barre). Dancers applying for individual coaching also submit a second link (max 3 minutes) of a pre-rehearsed solo or variation.

requirements.description: YouTube video link required (max 6 minutes): ballet and contemporary class material (centre work; no barre). Dancers applying for individual coaching also submit a second link (max 3 minutes) of a pre-rehearsed solo or variation.

prices.label: Advanced & Pre-professional Dance Intensive course fee
prices.notes: Includes all dance classes, workshops, and coaching. Accommodation and meals not included.

prices.label: Royal Conservatoire student fee
prices.notes: Includes all dance classes, workshops, and coaching. Accommodation and meals not included.
